sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90065" key="prosstaltiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσσταλ-τικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n90065.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">reducing</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">π. τῶν ὄγκων φάρμακα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg012:49" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.49</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
